options.content:
# Phase-One Services

| Service | Dashboard | Signals today | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Platform host health | [System Resources](/grafana/d/system-resources/system-resources) | Metrics | Fleet and per-host resource drilldown. |
| Frontier Indexer | [Frontier Indexer Service](/grafana/d/svc-frontier-indexer/frontier-indexer-service) | Metrics, logs | Uses the existing detailed frontier metrics dashboard as a linked deep dive. |
| Dependency Track | [Dependency Track Service](/grafana/d/svc-dependency-track/dependency-track-service) | Metrics, logs | API metrics are scraped directly from the apiserver and logs are labeled in Alloy. |
| Grafana OnCall | [OnCall Service](/grafana/d/svc-oncall/oncall-service) | Logs | Metrics exporter remains disabled and is surfaced as an explicit gap. |
| Hermes | [Hermes Service](/grafana/d/svc-hermes/hermes-service) | Logs | External UI is linked directly while metrics and traces mature. |
| Home Assistant | [Home Assistant Service](/grafana/d/svc-home-assistant/home-assistant-service) | Logs | Metrics and traces remain planned follow-up work and are called out in the dashboard. |
| UniFi Network Logs | [UniFi Network Logs](/grafana/d/svc-unifi-network-logs/unifi-network-logs) | Logs | Retained UCG Ultra firewall, threat, and warning-level network events collected through the managed Vector receiver. |

## Conventions

- Platform dashboards use the `ops-` UID prefix and live under `Operations / Platform`.
- New service dashboards use the `svc-` UID prefix and live under `Operations / Services`.
- Existing dashboard UIDs stay unchanged when already relied on by external links or prior changes.
- Dashboard JSON under `terraform/dashboards` is the source of truth for the Grafana operations portal.
- Cross-signal drilldown uses `service` plus `host` identity when the runtime emits those labels or attributes.
